# SSH 命令超时控制
# 替换 YOUR_HOST / YOUR_PASSWORD 为实际值后运行
#
# 5秒内完成
# 编码前: {"host": "YOUR_HOST", "port": 22, "user": "root", "password": "YOUR_PASSWORD", "action": "cmd", "cmd": "sleep 1 && echo done", "cmd_timeout": "5s"}
aitk SSH_7b22686f7374223a2022594f55525f484f5354222c2022706f7274223a2032322c202275736572223a2022726f6f74222c202270617373776f7264223a2022594f55525f50415353574f5244222c2022616374696f6e223a2022636d64222c2022636d64223a2022736c6565702031202626206563686f20646f6e65222c2022636d645f74696d656f7574223a20223573227d

# 2秒超时 → timed_out=true, exit_code=-1
# 编码前: {"host": "YOUR_HOST", "port": 22, "user": "root", "password": "YOUR_PASSWORD", "action": "cmd", "cmd": "sleep 30", "cmd_timeout": "2s"}
aitk SSH_7b22686f7374223a2022594f55525f484f5354222c2022706f7274223a2032322c202275736572223a2022726f6f74222c202270617373776f7264223a2022594f55525f50415353574f5244222c2022616374696f6e223a2022636d64222c2022636d64223a2022736c656570203330222c2022636d645f74696d656f7574223a20223273227d
